name: REPAIRCASHTOTALS_123_01
definition:
CREATE PROCEDURE REPAIRCASHTOTALS_123_01
AS
DECLARE @TRCODE    SMALLINT
DECLARE @TRDATE    DATETIME
DECLARE @TRSIGN    SMALLINT
DECLARE @CASHREF   INT
DECLARE @AMOUNT    FLOAT
DECLARE @REPORTNET FLOAT
DECLARE @TRNET     FLOAT
DECLARE @TRCURR    SMALLINT
DECLARE @CANCELLED SMALLINT
DECLARE @STATUS    SMALLINT
set NOCOUNT ON
DELETE FROM LG_123_01_CSHTOTS WHERE  CARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_KSCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_KSCARD_I2)  WHERE (ACTIVE IN (0)))
DECLARE CurS CURSOR FOR
 SELECT TRCODE, DATE_, SIGN, CARDREF, SUM(AMOUNT), SUM(REPORTNET), SUM(TRNET), TRCURR, CANCELLED, STATUS
 FROM LG_123_01_KSLINES WITH(INDEX = I123_01_KSLINES_I2) WHERE  CARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_KSCARD WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_KSCARD_I2)  WHERE (ACTIVE IN (0)))
 GROUP BY TRCODE, DATE_, SIGN, CARDREF, CANCELLED, STATUS, TRNET, TRCURR
OPEN CurS
FETCH NEXT FROM CurS
INTO @TRCODE, @TRDATE, @TRSIGN, @CASHREF,  @AMOUNT, @REPORTNET, @TRNET, @TRCURR, @CANCELLED, @STATUS
 WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
 BEGIN
   BEGIN TRANSACTION
     EXECUTE LG_UPDATE_CASHTRANS_123_01 1, @TRCODE, @TRDATE, @TRSIGN, @CASHREF,  @AMOUNT, @REPORTNET, @TRNET, @TRCURR, @CANCELLED, @STATUS
   COMMIT TRANSACTION
   FETCH NEXT FROM CurS
   INTO @TRCODE, @TRDATE, @TRSIGN, @CASHREF,  @AMOUNT, @REPORTNET, @TRNET, @TRCURR, @CANCELLED, @STATUS
 END
CLOSE CurS
DEALLOCATE CurS
